raw_text: The ceiling above my bathroom has a small water stain, has had it for a week, nothing dripping yet.
Lightbulb in hallway is out, no rush.
Hi, no heat in unit 4B again. It is 52 degrees inside. Please send someone today.
HOA newsletter: pool hours updated for July. No action needed.
Smell of gas near the stove when I got home — turned off the burner knob but still faint odor.
Can you confirm you recieved my maintanance request from last week about the drippy faucet?
City code violation notice scanned copy attached — says exterior stairs need railing repair by Friday.
Package room code not working again, not urgent.
